title: Add stock reservation tracking and release capability
author: eval-bot

context_units.diff_patch:
--- a/app/inventory/stock.py
+++ b/app/inventory/stock.py
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 class StockManager:
     def __init__(self) -> None:
         self._stock: dict[str, int] = {}
+        self._reservations: dict[str, int] = {}
 
     def add_stock(self, sku: str, qty: int) -> None:
         self._stock[sku] = self._stock.get(sku, 0) + qty
@@ -10,4 +11,11 @@
         if available < qty:
             return False
         self._stock[sku] = available - qty
+        self._reservations[sku] = self._reservations.get(sku, 0) + qty
         return True
+
+    def release_reservation(self, sku: str, qty: int) -> None:
+        reserved = self._reservations.get(sku, 0)
+        released = min(reserved, qty)
+        self._reservations[sku] = reserved - released
+        self._stock[sku] = self._stock.get(sku, 0) + released

context_units.body_old:
import pytest
from app.inventory.stock import StockManager


def test_reserve_success():
    mgr = StockManager()
    mgr.add_stock("SKU-A", 10)
    assert mgr.reserve("SKU-A", 3) is True
    assert mgr.reserve("SKU-A", 8) is False


def test_reserve_insufficient():
    mgr = StockManager()
    mgr.add_stock("SKU-B", 2)
    reserved = mgr.reserve("SKU-B", 5)
    assert reserved is False


def test_reserve_exact():
    mgr = StockManager()
    mgr.add_stock("SKU-C", 5)
    assert mgr.reserve("SKU-C", 5) is True
    assert mgr.reserve("SKU-C", 1) is False
context_units.body_new:
import pytest
from app.inventory.stock import StockManager


def test_reserve_success():
    mgr = StockManager()
    mgr.add_stock("SKU-A", 10)
    assert mgr.reserve("SKU-A", 3) is True
    assert mgr.reserve("SKU-A", 8) is False


def test_reserve_insufficient():
    mgr = StockManager()
    mgr.add_stock("SKU-B", 2)
    reserved = mgr.reserve("SKU-B", 5)
    assert reserved is False


def test_release_reservation():
    mgr = StockManager()
    mgr.add_stock("SKU-C", 5)
    mgr.reserve("SKU-C", 5)
    mgr.release_reservation("SKU-C", 3)
context_units.diff_patch:
--- a/tests/test_stock.py
+++ b/tests/test_stock.py
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@
     assert reserved is False
 
 
-def test_reserve_exact():
+def test_release_reservation():
     mgr = StockManager()
     mgr.add_stock("SKU-C", 5)
-    assert mgr.reserve("SKU-C", 5) is True
-    assert mgr.reserve("SKU-C", 1) is False
+    mgr.reserve("SKU-C", 5)
+    mgr.release_reservation("SKU-C", 3)

+    def release_reservation(self, sku: str, qty: int) -> None:

expected_findings.title: New public method release_reservation has no test coverage
expected_findings.rationale: release_reservation introduces a min() branch and mutates two internal dicts, but no test exercises it. Releasing more than reserved, releasing an unknown SKU, and releasing exactly the reserved quantity are all uncovered.

expected_findings.title: Test calls release_reservation but contains no assertion
expected_findings.rationale: test_release_reservation invokes the method but never asserts the resulting stock or reservation counts. The test will pass even if release_reservation corrupts internal state or silently does nothing.
